mainEntity.name: Can AI chatbots generate referrals for Chicago personal injury firms?
mainEntity.text: Can AI chatbots generate referrals for Chicago personal injury firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: Custom AI chatbots trained on firm data can answer queries 24/7, positioning Chicago PI firms for indirect referrals via engagement.[4]

suggestedAnswer.text: ApricotLaw-style bots handle intakes, cite firm strengths. Integrate schema. Boosts site dwell time for AI. Chicago PI high-volume—scale leads. Privacy risks; comply with rules. Competitors adopt fast.[4]

name: AI Chatbots for Chicago PI Referrals
